query:
-- Ver todos os produtos com SKU 443060 ou nome EXTENSOFIX
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId FROM products WHERE sku LIKE '%443060%' OR description LIKE '%EXTENSOFIX%';

-- Ver o inventory do EXTENSOFIX (via productId que está no inventory)
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.status, p.sku, p.description, p.tenantId AS productTenantId
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN products p ON i.productId = p.id
WHERE p.sku LIKE '%443060%' OR p.description LIKE '%EXTENSOFIX%';
